data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances account security by requiring an additional verification step.

data.title: Encryption
data.description: Protects sensitive user data during transmission and storage.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit; AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Account Activity Monitoring
data.description: Detects unusual activity and alerts users to potential unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models to identify anomalies.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Encourages external security experts to find and report vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Collaboration with ethical hackers to improve security.

data.title: Data Breach Response
data.description: Protocols in place to respond to data breaches effectively.
data.technical_spec: Incident response teams and automated alerts.
